{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Forger trick
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Forger trick]] can duplicate a weapon with green echoes.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13">''Soulsmith'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
